description: CompositionBright yellow T-shirt made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a ribbed round neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, graphic print on the front, graphic detailing towards the right hem and brand logo in a reflective material on the left sleeve FittingFittedWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryThis nike Cruiser Lungs and Heart T-shirt is designed for serious runners. The tee features a fitted design for reduced bulk, and Dri-Fit sweat-wicking fabric that keeps you dry and comfortable during long runs. The graphic print on the front is a thermal scan of a runners' lungs. The small graphic scale towards the right hem shows runners in different stages. Team this with track pants and performance running shoes before you hit the trails.
